# Proval

> Self-hosted, privacy-first AI code review agent for GitLab, Forgejo, and GitHub.

Proval connects to your Git provider via webhooks, runs a lightweight agent loop with your own LLM, and posts reviews and replies on your infrastructure. It is not an IDE copilot. It is a team review tool with set and forget configuration.

## Key facts

- Open source and self-hosted (Docker Compose)
- Bring your own model (OpenAI-compatible APIs, Anthropic, Ollama, llama.cpp)
- GitHub, GitLab, and Forgejo (Gitea and Codeberg via Forgejo-compatible APIs)
- Pull request review, inline comments, issue comments, and threaded replies
- No seat based pricing for the core product
